title: Metrics for LLM inference
snippet:
## Token

- Input Sequence Length (ISL)
- Output Sequence Length (OSL)

## Latency

- Time To First Token (TTFT)
 - First Token Latency (FTL)
 - e.g. P90 TTFT <

documents.title: Metrics for LLM inference
documents.snippet:
## Token

- Input Sequence Length (ISL)
- Output Sequence Length (OSL)

## Latency

- Time To First Token (TTFT)
 - First Token Latency (FTL)
 - e.g. P90 TTFT <
